ItemizedHospital prices, finally.
Methodology FAQ Got a bill?

42 procedures.
Real prices. Real hospitals.

Compare cash-pay and insurance prices for 42 commonly shopped medical procedures across 149 US hospitals in 68 metros. All data pulled directly from CMS-mandated price transparency files. Last refreshed 2026-04-27.

Imaging

  • Abdominal ultrasound, complete CPT 76700 $20 to $28,395 148 hospitals
  • Brain MRI with and without contrast CPT 70553 $58 to $34,391 149 hospitals
  • Brain MRI without contrast CPT 70551 $25 to $18,640 149 hospitals
  • Chest X-ray, single view CPT 71045 $16 to $2,059 147 hospitals
  • CT abdomen and pelvis with contrast CPT 74177 $46 to $34,168 148 hospitals
  • DXA bone density scan CPT 77080 $11 to $46,473 140 hospitals
  • Knee/lower-extremity MRI without contrast CPT 73721 $34 to $32,963 145 hospitals
  • Lumbar spine MRI without contrast CPT 72148 $37 to $19,475 149 hospitals
  • Mammogram, screening CPT 77067 $18 to $3,364 132 hospitals
  • Thyroid ultrasound CPT 76536 $14 to $8,937 148 hospitals

Lab

  • CBC with differential CPT 85025 $11 to $703 148 hospitals
  • Comprehensive metabolic panel CPT 80053 $10 to $3,364 148 hospitals
  • Hemoglobin A1c CPT 83036 $10 to $698 149 hospitals
  • Lipid panel CPT 80061 $11 to $13,046 147 hospitals
  • TSH (thyroid stimulating hormone) CPT 84443 $10 to $3,389 148 hospitals
  • Urinalysis CPT 81002 $10 to $427 139 hospitals

Procedure

  • Colonoscopy with polyp removal CPT 45385 $38 to $19,816 132 hospitals
  • Colonoscopy, diagnostic CPT 45378 $58 to $18,448 131 hospitals
  • Lumbar epidural steroid injection CPT 64483 $59 to $18,771 137 hospitals
  • Polysomnography (sleep study) CPT 95810 $19 to $19,079 121 hospitals
  • Prostate biopsy CPT 55700 $69 to $17,133 123 hospitals
  • Upper endoscopy (EGD) with biopsy CPT 43239 $66 to $25,187 132 hospitals

Surgery

  • Carpal tunnel release CPT 29848 $259 to $19,743 108 hospitals
  • Cataract surgery, one eye CPT 66984 $284 to $37,599 106 hospitals
  • Inguinal hernia repair, open CPT 49505 $153 to $81,453 124 hospitals
  • Knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy CPT 29881 $43 to $42,854 119 hospitals
  • Laparoscopic cholecystectomy CPT 47562 $15 to $67,154 125 hospitals
  • Septoplasty (deviated septum repair) CPT 30520 $342 to $51,251 117 hospitals
  • Total abdominal hysterectomy CPT 58150 $11 to $51,289 97 hospitals
  • Total hip replacement CPT 27130 $98 to $96,229 115 hospitals
  • Total knee replacement CPT 27447 $63 to $92,390 111 hospitals
  • Ureteroscopy with lithotripsy (kidney stone) CPT 52353 $24 to $73,724 119 hospitals

Office

  • New patient office visit, level 3 CPT 99203 $23 to $16,591 125 hospitals
  • New patient office visit, level 4 CPT 99204 $21 to $16,591 128 hospitals
  • Office visit, established patient, level 3 CPT 99213 $16 to $14,888 129 hospitals
  • Office visit, established patient, level 4 CPT 99214 $31 to $27,777 127 hospitals
  • Psychotherapy, 45 minutes CPT 90834 $35 to $892 108 hospitals

Maternity

  • Cesarean delivery, global CPT 59510 $82 to $25,369 80 hospitals
  • Vaginal delivery, global CPT 59400 $277 to $25,369 81 hospitals

Cardiac

  • Carotid duplex ultrasound CPT 93880 $15 to $6,184 149 hospitals
  • Echocardiogram, complete with Doppler CPT 93306 $36 to $19,965 149 hospitals
  • EKG with interpretation CPT 93000 $12 to $1,065 81 hospitals
Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (dataset xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
